policy.note: This guard validates the worker boundary pack. It does not unlock private diagnostics, record decisions or run worker tasks.

findings.message: Pack must remain review-only locked or metadata-diagnostic ready.
Pack must be metadata-only.
Pack must not read private content.
Pack must not copy private content.
Pack must block public writes.
Pack must block public-ready flags.
Pack must block local-worker Git.
Data lane must have all configured steps passed.
Data lane must be review-only passed.
Source-root must be blocked or activation preflight must be metadata-diagnostic ready.
Probable private libraries may only be nonzero after activation is ready.
Selected root may exist only after activation is ready.
Private diagnostic may only be allowed when activation preflight is ready.
Private inventory may only be allowed when activation preflight is ready.
Source-root activation status must be a known guarded state.
Public-ready total must remain 0.
Pack must define three worker boundaries.
Worker boundary must exist: kosmo-local-llm.
Worker boundary must exist: codex-central-overseer.
Worker boundary must exist: claude-code-kosmooverseer.
Local LLM scope must be metadata_review_only.
Local LLM must block private reads/OCR.
Local LLM must block private excerpts in Git.
Local LLM must block public-ready writes.
Local LLM must block Git/cloud/upload commands.
Worker boundary pack command must be allowed.
Activation preflight command must be allowed.
Private metadata inventory command must be available as a self-guarding command.
Private-library diagnostic must be blocked until activation preflight is ready.
Private inventory extraction must be blocked until activation preflight is ready.
Public promotion must be blocked.
No allowed command may set public_ready=true.
Escalation triggers must include real private library root.
Escalation triggers must include OneDrive sync repair.
Escalation triggers must include private_diagnostic_allowed=true.
Escalation triggers must include activation preflight readiness.
Escalation triggers must include private metadata inventory contract output.
Escalation triggers must include explicit current owner answers.

next_actions: Use the worker boundary pack as first instruction context for local LLM and overseer handoffs.
Keep private reads, Git/cloud actions and public-ready flags blocked while the pack is review-only locked.
Rerun this guard after router, source-root or worker role changes.
